tests.name: UsersPage renders the role-assignment grid with a column per partner + Staff/Adm
UsersPage shows a filter input
UsersPage facets to holders of a role when its column header is clicked, and back
ProposalsPage lists special proposals with the master-list columns
ProposalsPage offers status / type / semester facet dropdowns instead of a resolved toggle
TimeAwardsGrid keeps a partner row visible when its only allocation is zeroed
AuthGate blocks when not signed in, and does not show admin content
AuthGate denies a signed-in PI, showing their actual role
AuthGate treats an expired staff token as signed out
AuthGate renders the app for staff
Layout shows the wordmark, environment pill, and signed-in user
similarModeTypes pairs the sc-9243 similar instruments, same configuration style
similarModeTypes is empty for mode-less sources
formatModeType renders instrument + configuration style
mapConflictCandidates merges both pools, keeping only ToO-program observations from the second
matchConflicts matches a similar mode within the field-of-view distance
matchConflicts excludes matches beyond the distance, in the same program, or of a dissimilar mode
matchConflicts skips sources without coordinates (ToO configurations)
matchConflicts gives each row a unique key when one candidate conflicts with several sources
mapPrograms returns an empty array when there are no matches
mapPrograms projects a Queue program, reading contact scientists from SUPPORT roles and thesis from ProgramUser
mapPrograms treats Classical proposals as CLASSICAL with no ToO/Band-3 (those are Queue-only)
mapPrograms shows the 1901–2099 sentinel bounds as blank dates, keeps a real range
proposalTypeInput builds the queue arm of the oneOf for Queue programs
proposalTypeInput builds the classical arm for Classical programs
allocationsInput sends only positive awards, keeping zero cells as grid-only editing state
programPropertiesInput carries the GOA properties and active period
programPropertiesInput omits blank active dates rather than sending empty strings
mapCfps returns an empty array on no matches
mapCfps projects a Gemini call, keeping instrument enum values and every partner
mapCfps drops non-Gemini calls (no gemini property block)
mapCfps is open while today is before the latest partner deadline, closed once all have passed
cfpPropertiesInput serializes an edited call, Gemini properties under `gemini`
currentSemester assigns Feb-Jul to A and Aug-Dec to B
currentSemester assigns January to the previous year's B semester
semesterDates spans Feb-Aug for A and Aug-Feb (of the next year) for B
mapChangeRequests projects coordinates, instrument/site, and a percentile-based conditions string
mapObservationsById keys observation rows by id, with coordinates, config, and conditions
groupChangeRequestsByProgram synthesizes the per-program status per the sc-9094 mockup
friendlyError translates auth failures into actionable messages
friendlyError translates network failures
friendlyError passes other messages through, truncated, and stringifies non-Errors
archiveSearchSpec searches both GMOS sites with a single GMOS query
archiveSearchSpec pairs similar instruments with one query each (GNIRS ~ Flamingos-2)
archiveSearchSpec floors the search radius at 60″ for small-aperture configurations
archiveSearchSpec returns null for unsearchable modes
archiveQueryUrl builds the proxied jsonsummary cone-search URL
separationArcsec is zero for identical coordinates
separationArcsec scales RA offsets by cos(dec)
separationArcsec measures pure declination offsets exactly
aggregateDuplicates produces one row per observation_id with file and QA-Pass counts
aggregateDuplicates skips files without an observation id and tolerates missing coordinates
mapProposals projects only special-subtype proposals, with abstract + observation rows
semesterOfReference parses the semester token, degrading to an em-dash
currentAccess reads the active standard role
currentAccess maps guest/service/null
accessAtLeast (hierarchy guest<pi<ngo<staff<admin<service) staff meets the staff bar; pi does not
accessAtLeast (hierarchy guest<pi<ngo<staff<admin<service) admin clears staff and admin bars
accessAtLeast (hierarchy guest<pi<ngo<staff<admin<service) service outranks everything
canAccessAdmin admits staff and admin, rejects pi/ngo/guest
displayName prefers given + family name
displayName handles guest, service, and null
displayName falls back to ORCID when no name is present
mapObservationRow states the instrument once, with the observing mode as a short suffix
mapObservationRow strips instrument prefixes whose enum form has an underscore before the digit
mapObservationRow shows non-sidereal targets without coordinates
